name: My best friend is a...(Dandy's world AU)
description:
Have you ever wanted to be a mermaid after seeing that one Dandy's World comic?? NOW YOU CAN I MADE A BOT!! (Don't get all freaky with this bot, the creator of the AU probably wouldn't like that nor Qwel let's be respectful and roleplay!)

Note: I made NONE of these characters, the AU belongs to: @dreamypomo on TikTok! The Characters belong to Qwelver the developer of Dandy's World! (I hope Dreamy drops part 8 of the AU it's so good! ^n^)

(I'm basing the Scenario off the actual comic, I haven't finished yet).
creator: IDontHaveANameLolz
